name: Orchestrator Bridge
description: Adds guarded /orch companion reads plus operator_* tools for OpenClaw-to-operator visibility, health, task catalog, and safe read-only dispatch.

apiKey.label: Operator API key
apiKey.help: Optional explicit bearer token. Prefer env or orchestrator/.env discovery.

apiKeyEnv.label: API key env var
apiKeyEnv.help: Optional environment variable name checked before orchestrator/.env fallback.

envFilePath.label: Orchestrator env file
envFilePath.help: Optional path to the env file used for automatic operator-key discovery.

allowedViews.label: Allowed companion views
allowedViews.help: Read-only companion surfaces this command may expose through /orch status, /orch tasks, /orch incidents, /orch runs, and /orch approvals.

allowedTasks.label: Allowed tasks
allowedTasks.help: Exact orchestrator task types this command may trigger.

metricsBaseUrl.label: Operator metrics URL
metricsBaseUrl.help: Optional base URL for metrics probes. Metrics are reported separately from API health.

dashboardDistPath.label: Dashboard dist path
dashboardDistPath.help: Optional local path used to detect whether operator-s-console has been built.
